narrative:
Parma municipal court district has 117,813 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.4 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +3.3% D−R vs +7.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
